data Bucket
  mut tokens: Int
end

fn allow(_ bucket: Bucket) -> Bool
  if bucket.tokens >= 1
    mut b = bucket
    b.tokens = b.tokens - 1
    true
  else
    false
  end
end

let bucket = Bucket(tokens: 3)

if allow(bucket)
  print("ALLOW")
else
  print("DENY")
end
